  "society_power": 5.5,
  "state_power": 7.1,
  "key_event": "Annulment of Bengal Partition proves society can check state power.",
  "reasoning": "The mass-based Swadeshi movement, culminating in the state's reversal of the Bengal Partition, represented a quantum leap in society's ability to organize and constrain the colonial state. While the state remained strong and used reforms to manage dissent, it was forced to retreat on a major policy, demonstrating a slight reduction in its absolute authority and a significant increase in societal power.",

  "state_change": -0.2
